Residential Stucco in Milam County, TX

Milam County is a rural Central Texas community anchored by Cameron and Rockdale, where homeowners value practical, long-lasting building materials. Star Stucco of Austin installs residential stucco systems that protect homes from the region's heat, heavy rains, and clay soil movement while adding lasting curb appeal.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Practical Stucco for Milam County Homeowners

Milam County lies northeast of Austin where the Blackland Prairie meets the Post Oak Belt. The landscape is agricultural — cotton fields, cattle ranches, and pecan groves along the Little River and San Gabriel River bottomlands. Homes range from turn-of-the-century farmhouses in Cameron to newer residential builds on acreage near Rockdale.

The county's soils include heavy black clay in the western portions and sandy loam toward the east. This mix, combined with hot summers that routinely exceed 100 degrees and heavy spring thunderstorms, creates conditions where exterior finishes must be tough, well-anchored, and moisture-resistant.

Our crews are experienced with rural Central Texas properties and arrive at Milam County job sites fully prepared. We understand the value of getting the job done right the first time in a community where practical results matter more than sales talk.

What's Included With Our Residential Stucco in Milam County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Home & Site Inspection

We review your home's exterior walls, foundation type, soil conditions, and drainage to specify the right stucco system for your Milam County property.

Surface Preparation

Old finishes are removed, substrates are cleaned and primed, and weather barriers are installed to protect against moisture.

Lath & Scratch Coat

Metal lath is fastened securely to the substrate, and a scratch coat is applied with proper keying. We build in cure time between coats.

Brown Coat

The leveling brown coat creates a smooth, plumb surface that serves as the foundation for a uniform finish coat.

Finish Coat & Color

The final texture and color are applied by hand for a consistent result that resists Central Texas heat and UV exposure.

Final Review

We walk the project with you, address any concerns, clean the work area, and provide warranty documentation.

Common Residential Stucco Needs in Milam County

Milam County homeowners appreciate stucco for its durability, low upkeep, and suitability for rural and small-town properties.

New Construction on Acreage

Building a new home on Milam County land deserves an exterior finish that holds up for decades with minimal maintenance. Stucco delivers that performance.

Updating Older Homes

Cameron and Rockdale have older homes with worn siding or aging exteriors. Stucco transforms the look and adds a protective shell against weather and pests.

Clay Soil Crack Prevention

The Blackland clay in western Milam County causes foundation movement that can crack exterior surfaces. We use reinforced systems with control joints to manage this stress.

Outbuilding & Workshop Stucco

Barns, workshops, and detached buildings on Milam County properties benefit from stucco that matches the home and stands up to agricultural use.

Durable Exterior for All Seasons

From summer heat to winter ice, Milam County weather tests every exterior surface. Stucco withstands the full range of conditions better than most alternatives.

Why Choose Us for Residential Stucco in Milam County?

  • Experienced with rural Milam County properties and their unique site conditions
  • Stucco systems that handle both Blackland clay and sandy loam soils
  • Plain-spoken assessments — we tell you exactly what your home needs
  • Self-reliant crews prepared for rural job sites without nearby supply access
  • Long-lasting finishes designed for Central Texas heat, rain, and UV
  • Free estimates for properties throughout Milam County

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Milam County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Residential Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Schedule Your Estimate

Call (512) 706-9699 or request a visit through our website. We serve all of Milam County, including Cameron, Rockdale, and surrounding areas.

2

Property Evaluation

We visit your home, assess the walls and site conditions, and discuss your preferences and budget for the stucco project.

3

Clear Written Proposal

Your estimate includes itemized costs, material details, schedule, and warranty information — no guesswork.

4

Complete the Work

Our crew installs the stucco system professionally, keeps the site orderly, and walks the finished project with you.
